1. Roman Empire (26 BCE - 395 CE)
2. Byzantine Empire (395 - 1354 CE)
3. Ottoman Empire (1354 - 1922)

Note: This list may not be fully comprehensive due to limitations in historical data modeling in Wikidata, particularly regarding earlier empires like the Achaemenid or Hellenistic kingdoms which might not have explicit time-qualified territorial relationships recorded.
